executiveSummary.headline: Your site scores 82/100 — there are meaningful improvements that could boost performance and conversions.
executiveSummary.callToAction: The issues identified below are actionable improvements that can increase search rankings, improve user experience, and drive more conversions. Our team can resolve these efficiently.

navigation.insight: All navigation links are functional and properly structured.

findings.message: Page is NOT mobile-responsive — failing on the majority of today's web traffic.
7 navigation anchor link(s) have unknown resolution.
No clear call-to-action buttons detected — missed conversion opportunity.

opportunities: Optimise 1 slow-loading resource(s) to improve page speed.
Implement responsive CSS breakpoints for mobile devices (375px viewport).
Add prominent CTA buttons to drive user engagement and conversions.
Audit and fix anchor-based navigation links.

categoryScorecard.title: How Your Site Performs by Category

categories.name: Page Health
categories.description: HTTP status, server errors, and critical failures

categories.name: Page Speed
categories.description: First Contentful Paint, TTFB, and load times

categories.name: Mobile Experience
categories.description: Responsiveness across mobile, tablet, and desktop

categories.name: Navigation & Links
categories.description: Broken links, anchor integrity, and link structure
